title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Raxaul
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Raxaul constituency.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Raxaul triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Raxaul, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Raxaul assembly segment.
